tailoring_notes: Mirrored JD vocabulary throughout: COGs attribution, R&D spend efficiency, capacity planning, GPU/compute allocation, infrastructure programs, cross-functional without direct authority.
Dropped one microsoft_ft bullet and tightened phrasing across all roles to fit one page while preserving every role's min bullet count.
Reframed Power BI bullet as a spend attribution dashboard to directly echo the JD's cost-data-for-decision-making theme.
Bold emphasis targets metrics and outcome nouns recruiters scan for first, kept to 1–2 per bullet per rules.
